chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-873 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.3571/2026. 2. For orders on Misc. No.3572/2026. 3. For orders on Misc. No.3573/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2026. Mr. Mazhar Imtiaz Lari, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------ 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. Through these proceedings, the Petitioner has assailed the vires of Infrastructure Cess, as is now being levied through the Sindh Development and Maintenance of Infrastructure Cess Act, 2017. The controversy has already been addressed through the judgment dated 04.06.2021, passed by a Division Bench of this Court in Const. Petition No.D-3309 of 2011. Under the given circumstances, learned counsel for the Petitioner seeks disposal of the Petition in hand in light of aforesaid judgment. Mr. Hashham Mahar, Assistant Advocate General Sindh, who is present in Court in other matters, waives notice of the instant Petition and after going through the same has accorded his no objection for disposal of the Petition in line with the cited judgment. As such, the instant Petition stands disposed of accordingly alongwith other Miscellaneous Applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
